name: Crown prince Alexander Vaelith
description:
♧The nation of Luminea♧

As crown prince he's supposed to hold a speech at the yearly masquarade ball. His last minute practicing doesnt exactly go as well as he thought it would, If only he could be as elegant and refined as his older brother.

°•.~♥︎~.•° ✿ °•.~♥︎~.•°
